mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messenger (sender_id, receiver_id, content, send_time, read_status, file_path, room_id) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, NOW(), 0, #{filePath}, #{roomId});
INSERT INTO messenger (sender_id, room_id, content, send_time, read_status, file_path) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{roomId}, #{content}, NOW(), 0, #{filePath});
INSERT INTO messenger (sender_id, receiver_id, content, send_time, read_status, file_path) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, NOW(), 0, #{filePath});
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messenger WHERE messenger_id = #{msgId}

SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.name AS empName, e.email AS empEmail, e.phone AS empPhone, e.img_url AS empImg, d.name AS department, p.name AS position FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.department_id = CAST(#{deptId} AS UNSIGNED) ORDER BY e.name ASC;

SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.name AS empName, e.email AS empEmail, e.phone AS empPhone, e.img_url AS empImg, d.name AS department, p.name AS position FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.emp_id = CAST(#{empId} AS UNSIGNED);

SELECT m.messenger_id, m.content, m.send_time, m.read_status, m.room_id, m.file_path AS filePath, s.emp_id AS sender_id, s.name AS sender_name, r.emp_id AS receiver_id, r.name AS receiver_name FROM messenger m JOIN employee s ON m.sender_id = s.emp_id JOIN employee r ON m.receiver_id = r.emp_id WHERE m.sender_id = CAST(#{senderId} AS UNSIGNED) ORDER BY m.send_time DESC;

SELECT m.messenger_id, m.content, m.send_time, m.read_status, m.room_id, m.file_path AS filePath, s.emp_id AS sender_id, s.name AS sender_name, r.emp_id AS receiver_id, r.name AS receiver_name FROM messenger m JOIN employee s ON m.sender_id = s.emp_id JOIN employee r ON m.receiver_id = r.emp_id WHERE m.receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY m.send_time DESC

SELECT m.messenger_id, m.content, m.read_status, m.file_attached, m.send_time, s.emp_id AS sender_id, s.name AS sender_name, s.email AS sender_email, s.phone AS sender_phone, s.img_url AS sender_img, d.name AS sender_department, p.name AS sender_position FROM messenger m JOIN employee s ON m.sender_id = s.emp_id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON s.position_id = p.position_id WHERE m.messenger_id = CAST(#{messageId} AS UNSIGNED) AND m.sender_id = CAST(#{senderId} AS UNSIGNED);

SELECT m.messenger_id, m.content, m.read_status, m.file_attached, m.send_time, s.emp_id AS sender_id, s.name AS sender_name, s.email AS sender_email, s.phone AS sender_phone, s.img_url AS sender_img, d.name AS sender_department, p.name AS sender_position FROM messenger m JOIN employee s ON m.sender_id = s.emp_id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON s.position_id = p.position_id WHERE m.messenger_id = CAST(#{messageId} AS UNSIGNED) AND m.receiver_id = CAST(#{receiverId} AS UNSIGNED);

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(unreadCount),0) FROM ( -- 1:1 메시지 unread 계산 (receiver_id가 있고, 아직 읽지 않은 경우) SELECT COUNT(*) AS unreadCount FROM messenger WHERE receiver_id = CAST(#{empId} AS UNSIGNED) AND room_id IS NULL AND read_status = 0 UNION ALL -- 단체 메시지 unread 계산 (단체 메시지는 receiver_id가 없으므로, 현재 사용자가 발신자가 아닌 메시지) SELECT COUNT(*) AS unreadCount FROM messenger WHERE room_id IS NOT NULL AND sender_id != CAST(#{empId} AS UNSIGNED) AND read_status = 0 ) t;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.messenger_id) AS room_count FROM messenger m WHERE m.sender_id = CAST(#{empId} AS UNSIGNED) OR m.receiver_id = CAST(#{empId} AS UNSIGNED);
mapper.update: UPDATE messenger SET read_status = 1 WHERE receiver_id = CAST(#{empId} AS UNSIGNED) AND read_status = 0;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messenger_file (messenger_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, upload_time) VALUES (#{messengerId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, NOW());
mapper.select: SELECT f.file_id, f.messenger_id, f.file_name, f.file_path, f.file_size, f.file_type, f.upload_time, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.send_time FROM messenger_file f JOIN messenger m ON f.messenger_id = m.messenger_id WHERE f.messenger_id = #{msgId};

SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.name AS empName, e.email AS empEmail, e.phone AS empPhone, e.img_url AS empImg, d.name AS department, p.name AS position FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.emp_id = #{receiverId};
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM messenger WHERE -- 단체 대화 (room_id가 null이 아니고 0도 아닌 경우) (room_id = #{roomId} AND #{roomId} != 0) OR -- 1:1 대화 (room_id가 null이거나 0이고, sender/receiver가 empId-otherEmpId 조합) ( (room_id IS NULL OR room_id = 0 OR #{roomId} = 0) AND ( (sender_id = #{empId} AND receiver_id = #{otherEmpId}) OR (sender_id = #{otherEmpId} AND receiver_id = #{empId}) ) );
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messenger_room (room_name, created_at) VALUES (#{roomName}, NOW());
mapper.select: SELECT rmp.room_id, rmp.emp_id, e.name AS empName FROM messenger_room_participants rmp JOIN employee e ON rmp.emp_id = e.emp_id WHERE rmp.room_id = #{roomId};

SELECT mr.room_id AS roomId, mr.room_name AS roomName, GROUP_CONCAT(e.name) AS participants FROM messenger_room mr JOIN messenger_room_participants mrp ON mr.room_id = mrp.room_id JOIN employee e ON mrp.emp_id = e.emp_id WHERE mrp.emp_id = #{empId} GROUP BY mr.room_id

SELECT m.messenger_id, m.sender_id, e.name AS sender_name, m.content, m.send_time, m.room_id, m.file_path AS filePath FROM messenger m JOIN employee e ON m.sender_id = e.emp_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.send_time ASC
